summary: Tested bug fixes for Pet Life Operating System: merge tickets, Dine/Stay seed-all, blogs, AI sync, Site Status. All backend APIs working. Fixed Site Status page error (missing Check icon import).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified working. Site Status page was broken due to missing Check icon import - fixed by adding Check to lucide-react imports in Admin.jsx.

merge_tickets.details: POST /api/tickets/merge accepts merge_ticket_ids parameter correctly. Returns 400 for missing params, 404 for non-existent tickets.

dine_seed_all.details: POST /api/admin/dine/seed-all endpoint works. Returns seeding results for restaurants, bundles, products. Requires admin auth.

stay_seed_all.details: POST /api/admin/stay/seed-all endpoint works. Seeded 8 bundles, 19 products. Requires admin auth.

blog_posts.details: GET /api/blog-posts returns 6 blog posts. Sample: '5 Tips for Throwing the Perfect Dog Birthday Party'

ai_product_intelligence.details: POST /api/admin/products/run-intelligence processed 1228 products, added 11319 tags, detected breeds and health tags.

sign_out_button.details: LogOut button exists in MemberDashboard.jsx at lines 844-851. Uses lucide-react LogOut icon with ghost variant.

site_status_page.details: Was showing 'ReferenceError: Check is not defined'. Fixed by adding Check to lucide-react imports in Admin.jsx line 134.

dine_manager_seed_all_button.details: Seed All Dine Data button visible in Dine Manager with data-testid='seed-all-dine-btn'

stay_manager_seed_all_button.details: Seed All Stay Data button visible in Stay Manager with data-testid='seed-all-stay-btn'

fixes_applied.issue: Site Status page showing 'ReferenceError: Check is not defined'
fixes_applied.fix: Added 'Check' to lucide-react imports at line 134
